findings.title: Deprecated azurerm provider version 1.x
findings.description: azurerm provider version 1.x is end-of-life and no longer maintained.
findings.suggested_fix: Update provider version constraint to ~> 4.0 and follow migration guide.

findings.title: Hardcoded credentials pattern
findings.description: Potential hardcoded password or API key detected.
findings.suggested_fix: Use environment variables, secret management, or Terraform variables for sensitive values.
